title: Fix lockfile reproducibility Python executable resolution
rawUserRequest: 发布前置检查在默认的 bare PYTHON=python3 环境中失败：Makefile 用 $(abspath $(PYTHON)) 将可执行文件名误解析为工作树内的伪路径，导致锁文件可复现性检查在昂贵 CI/PR 阶段才暴露。按根因方针，先把 Python 可执行文件解析固化为事前可验证的流程门禁；预算和格式检查并入本工单，不单独创建预算工单，不发布版本。

declaredIntent.summary: 让锁文件可复现性检查在默认 Python 名称、虚拟环境路径和显式绝对路径下都调用真实解释器，并在 PR 前暴露路径配置错误。

outOfScope: Adopter projects and installed runtime repositories
Changing lockfile contents or weakening reproducibility checks

sources.reason: The lockfile reproducibility recipe resolves bare PYTHON names with abspath and creates a nonexistent worktree-relative path.
Existing Makefile tests cover Python selection but not executable resolution for the lockfile recipe.
The functional Work Item archive growth must be measured and gated in the same correction.
Defines mandatory preflight, format, budget, PR, and closure ordering.

riskAssessment.reason: The change affects only interpreter resolution for an existing lockfile gate; it must preserve exact regenerated output and fail closed on missing executables.

executionDecision.reason: User authorized root process correction before retrying publication; no external release action is in scope.

preReviewWarnings: Verify bare executable names, virtual-environment paths, explicit absolute paths, and unchanged lockfile bytes.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record checkpoints before implementation and finish to prevent release-process drift.

acceptance: The lockfile reproducibility recipe resolves bare PYTHON names through the installed executable path.
Existing virtual-environment and explicit-path overrides continue to work.
Regression tests fail for the old worktree-relative path and pass for the corrected resolution.
Project formatting, governance complexity, budget, and all required AI gates pass before PR creation.
The Work Item completes archive, PR, merge, ai-close-work-item, branch cleanup, and default sync.
guidelines: Budget and formatting checks are hard preflight gates; do not create a budget-only Work Item.
Keep the lockfile gate fail-closed and do not weaken exact reproducibility comparison.
Do not modify adopter projects or publish a release from this Work Item.

intent.problem: The release preflight chain exposed a real Makefile bug only after entering the expensive gate sequence: $(abspath $(PYTHON)) turns bare python3 into a nonexistent path under the temporary directory.
constraints: Preserve PYTHON selection semantics for .venv and explicit overrides.
Keep the committed lockfile unchanged unless regeneration proves an actual dependency difference.
Treat format and budget checks as before-PR blockers.
intent.rationale: Resolve the configured interpreter once to a real executable path before changing directory, so the gate is deterministic across local and CI environments.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User explicitly authorized root process correction before retrying release publication.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore the original Makefile recipe and regression tests.

budgetImpact.reason: Include the single functional lockfile process-correction archive and measured regression coverage growth in this Work Item; do not create a separate budget Work Item.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: Bare PYTHON=python3 resolves a real executable for lockfile reproducibility
.venv/bin/python and explicit absolute paths remain supported
Release publication remains out of scope until this Work Item closes
